single.brief_rationale: Although the model was able to identify key error patterns, it failed to categorize at least three error patterns as required. The code also lacks visualizations and a clear rationale for the misclassifications. However, the model did correctly map each pattern to one concrete corrective action.

multi.brief_rationale: Although the multi-agent model was able to identify key error patterns, it failed to categorize at least three error patterns as required. The code also lacks visualizations and a clear rationale for the misclassifications. However, the model did correctly map each pattern to one concrete corrective action.

scores.comparison_notes: The single agent performed slightly better than the multi-agent model in terms of overall quality and methodology, but both models had similar levels of correctness. The single agent's code was also easier to understand due to its concise nature.
